Header noise that should NOT enter the hash.
Nav links also out of scope.

Text in Ad Images

Images in your ads should include little or no text. Ads with a higher proportion of text to image may not reach as many people. We recommend keeping text in image overlays under roughly 20% of the image area.

This guidance applies to feed and stories ad placements on Facebook and Instagram. Logos, watermarks and product labels also count toward the limit when they appear in the image.

Footer noise — also stripped by the `main` selector.
